description: SCM & forge boundary MCP: normalized, typed JSON from attributed Gitea, GitLab, and GitHub providers
name: io.github.attebury/remogram

environmentVariables.description: GitHub API token for github-api repositories.
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Alternative GitHub API token for github-api repositories.
environmentVariables.name: GH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: GitLab API token for gitlab-api repositories.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Gitea API token for gitea-api repositories.
environmentVariables.name: GITEA_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Repository root for Remogram to inspect when the MCP host launches from another working directory.
environmentVariables.name: REMOGRAM_CWD

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a local operator write-command overlay.
environmentVariables.name: REMOGRAM_OPERATOR_CONFIG

title: Remogram
